Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder
Enclosing class:
PipeFireRuptureResult
static final class PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder extends Object
Builder used by PipeFireRuptureStudy.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      private Builder(PipeFireRuptureInput input, PipeFireRuptureMaterial material, PipeFireRuptureScenario scenario, BlowdownPressureProfile pressureProfile)
      Creates a builder.
      Parameters:
      input - pipe input object
      material - material curve
      scenario - fire scenario
      pressureProfile - pressure profile

  • Method Details

    • addPoint

      void addPoint(double timeS, double pressure, double meanTemperature, double surfaceTemperature, double heatFlux, double stress, double strainRate, double strain, double strainLimit)
      Adds one time-series point.
      Parameters:
      timeS - time in seconds
      pressure - pressure in barg
      meanTemperature - mean wall temperature in degrees Celsius
      surfaceTemperature - outer surface temperature in degrees Celsius
      heatFlux - heat flux in kW/m2
      stress - von Mises stress in MPa
      strainRate - strain rate per minute
      strain - accumulated strain
      strainLimit - rupture strain limit

    • recordRupture

      void recordRupture(double timeS, double pressure, double meanTemperature, double surfaceTemperature, double strain, double strainLimit)
      Records rupture at the current state.
      Parameters:
      timeS - rupture time in seconds
      pressure - rupture pressure in barg
      meanTemperature - mean wall temperature in degrees Celsius
      surfaceTemperature - surface temperature in degrees Celsius
      strain - accumulated strain
      strainLimit - rupture strain limit

    • addWarning

      void addWarning(String warning)
      Adds a warning.
      Parameters:
      warning - warning text

    • addRecommendation

      void addRecommendation(String recommendation)
      Adds a recommendation.
      Parameters:
      recommendation - recommendation text

    • releaseEstimate

      void releaseEstimate(PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate releaseEstimate)
      Sets release estimate.
      Parameters:
      releaseEstimate - release estimate

    • build

      PipeFireRuptureResult build()
      Builds the result.
      Returns:
      pipe fire-rupture result
